nasb.text: When those who had been sent returned to the house, they found the slave in good health.

esv.text: And when those who had been sent returned to the house, they found the servant well.

cnv.text: 奉派的人回到家裡，見那奴僕已經好了。

ccb.text: 派去的几位朋友回到百夫长家里，发现那奴仆已经痊愈了。

csbs.text: 那些受托的人回到家里时，发现那奴仆已经痊愈了。
